description: Image PII detection (F-SEC-09): a ModalityScanner yields `ocrText` (OCR output) and `entityTypes` (direct detections, e.g. FACE) for a synthetic image; the modality guard runs the default text PII scanners over the extracted text, unions the direct detections, and the sorted unique entity types recorded on the context are compared to `expectedTypes`. Image bytes are stubbed to `ocrText` so the contract is deterministic across SDKs — real OCR is exercised by per-SDK smoke tests. Synthetic data only.

cases.ocrText: a photo of a sunset over the mountains
